theme: Tarmoq asoslari — ip, ss, dns, curl (to'liq kun)

tasks.title: Server IP manzili
tasks.why: Serverning IP manzili — ulanish va debug uchun birinchi qadam.
steps: Ishchi papkangga o't:  cd ~/devops/days/day-05/work
Birinchi IP ni yoz:  hostname -I | awk '{print $1}' > myip.txt

tasks.title: Tarmoq interfeyslari
tasks.why: Qaysi interfeyslar bor (lo, eth0...) — ip buyrug'i.
steps: Interfeyslarni qisqa ko'r va yoz:  ip -br a > ifaces.txt

tasks.title: ping bilan ulanish
tasks.why: ping — xost javob beradimi (ICMP). Tarmoq tirikmi tekshirish.
steps: 8.8.8.8 ga 2 marta ping yuborib saqla:  ping -c 2 8.8.8.8 > ping.txt

tasks.title: ss bilan ulanishlar
steps: Aktiv TCP ulanishlarni yoz:  ss -tn > conns.txt

tasks.title: Port bilimi (HTTP)
tasks.why: Standart portlarni yodda tutish — tez diagnostika.
steps: HTTP qaysi portда? Faqat raqamni yoz:  echo 80 > http.txt

tasks.title: Tinglanayotgan portlar
tasks.why: Qaysi servis qaysi portда eshitayapti? ss — port diagnostikasi.
steps: LISTEN holatdagi TCP portlarni yoz:  ss -tlnp > ports.txt

tasks.title: DNS so'rovi (nom → IP)
tasks.why: DNS domen nomini IP ga aylantiradi — internetning asosi.
steps: google.com ni IP ga aylantirib yoz:  getent hosts google.com > dns.txt

tasks.title: HTTP so'rov (curl)
tasks.why: curl bilan so'rov + javob header'lari — API debug.
steps: github.com header'larini ol:  curl -sI https://github.com > headers.txt

tasks.title: Port bilimi (HTTPS)
steps: HTTPS qaysi portда? Faqat raqamni yoz:  echo 443 > port.txt

tasks.title: Boshqa domen DNS
tasks.why: DNS mashqi: yana bir domenni IP ga aylantir.
steps: cloudflare.com ni IP ga aylantirib yoz:  getent hosts cloudflare.com > cf.txt

tasks.title: ss + grep (Day-4) — LISTEN ajrat
tasks.why: Day-4 grep: ss natijasidan faqat LISTEN qatorlarini ajrat.
steps: cd ~/devops/days/day-05/work && mkdir -p cb
ss -tln | grep LISTEN > cb/listen.txt

tasks.title: curl + grep (Day-4) — status ajrat
tasks.why: Day-4 grep: curl javobидан faqat HTTP status qatorini ol.
steps: mkdir -p cb
curl -sI https://example.com | grep -i '^HTTP' > cb/status.txt

tasks.title: Skeletni qur
steps: cd ~/devops/days/day-05/work
mkdir -p net/out

tasks.title: DNS tekshiruvi
steps: getent hosts github.com > net/out/dns.txt

tasks.title: HTTP tekshiruvi
steps: curl -sI https://github.com | grep -i '^HTTP' > net/out/http.txt

tasks.title: Hisobotni birlashtir (skript)
tasks.why: Loyiha yakuni: IP + DNS + HTTP holatini bitta hisobotга.
steps: net/check.sh yoz (#!/bin/bash): myip, dns, http fayllarini birlashtirsin
Masalan:  echo '== NET REPORT =='; echo 'DNS:'; cat net/out/dns.txt; echo 'HTTP:'; cat net/out/http.txt
Ishga tushir:  bash net/check.sh > net/report.txt

tasks.title: Kun xulosasi
steps: TCP va UDP farqini + ping nima uchun ishlatilishini ustozга ayt
